tasks.title: Add XThunder Discord planning cockpit
tasks.desc: Add a Discord Architect planning cockpit for XThunder that keeps the family battle card game separate from Emergence/MZspark and supports planning, scheduling, playtest logging, and build-in-public content.

tasks.title: Add XThunder Discord schedule envelopes
tasks.desc: Add dispatchable Discord event envelopes for the XThunder family battle-card planning rhythm: weekly plan, Aria Ability Lab, Charlie Rarity Vault, family playtest log, and content queue.

tasks.title: Add XThunder Discord weekly scheduler runner
tasks.desc: Add a small scheduler runner that selects the correct XThunder Discord event envelope by day-of-week and dispatches through the repaired Discord dispatcher. Default mode is dry-run. Live mode is blocked unless required Discord env is present.

tasks.title: Add XThunder Discord card packet builder
tasks.desc: Add source-backed XThunder Discord card packet builders for weekly planning, playtest logging, and build-in-public content without mutating the existing Discord dispatcher until the packet contract is verified.

tasks.title: Add XThunder Discord CLI event route
tasks.desc: Connect the verified XThunder dispatcher event helper to the actual dispatch_discord_event_001.py CLI path so dry-run can emit XThunder weekly, playtest, and build-in-public payloads without requiring Discord webhook env.

tasks.title: Add XThunder Discord dispatcher event
tasks.desc: Wire the verified XThunder Discord packet builder into the canonical Discord dispatcher behind an explicit xthunder_cards event flag, preserving existing closeout dispatch behavior.

tasks.title: Repair XThunder Discord card packet verification
tasks.desc: Repair verification for the XThunder Discord card packet builder after pytest failed during plugin startup because pytest-qt requires PyQt/PySide packages that are not installed in the Termux environment.

tasks.title: Repair XThunder Discord CLI direct execution
tasks.desc: Repair dispatch_discord_event_001.py so direct script execution from the repo root can import dreamvault modules and so --event-type xthunder_* dry-run routes to XThunder payload JSON lines.

tasks.title: Repair XThunder Discord direct CLI route
tasks.desc: Move XThunder dispatcher helper functions before the __main__ execution guard and enforce the --event-type xthunder_* dry-run branch so direct script execution emits payload JSON lines instead of the generic dispatcher dry-run.

tasks.title: Repair XThunder Discord direct CLI route using event_type line
tasks.desc: Repair direct XThunder dispatcher execution by moving helper functions before the __main__ guard and injecting the dry-run route after the stable event_type = args.event_type assignment.

tasks.title: Add XThunder v0.1 rulebook
tasks.desc: Create the first family-readable XThunder rulebook and playtest sheet in phases.

tasks.title: Create XThunder rulebook skeleton
tasks.desc: Create the initial XThunder v0.1 rulebook and playtest sheet skeletons only. Content will be filled in later phases.

tasks.title: Verify whole XThunder v0.1 rulebook
tasks.desc: Verify the manually edited whole XThunder v0.1 rulebook.
